commands.review_summary:
The PR adds gateway error logging when terminal session lifecycle persistence rejects and extends the agent-events test to assert the logged failure before fallback broadcast.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +9. Total +13 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a rejected `persistGatewaySessionLifecycleEvent` reaches the `server-chat.ts` fallback catch on current main and no diagnostic is logged before the fallback `sessions.changed` broadcast.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof and a small security-sensitive log-formatting fix, so this should stay in human review rather than repair automation.

target.title: fix: log terminal session persistence failures
target.body:
﻿Related: #97795

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where operators would not see any diagnostic output when a terminal session lifecycle persistence write failed during gateway run completion. The gateway still broadcast a fallback terminal snapshot, but the persistence failure itself was silent.

## Why This Change Was Made

The terminal lifecycle persistence failure path now logs the rejected write at the gateway event handling boundary before preserving the existing fallback broadcast behavior. This keeps cleanup and subscriber projection behavior unchanged while making database or filesystem persistence failures visible.

## User Impact

Operators get an actionable gateway error log when terminal session persistence fails, making session-state storage problems easier to diagnose without changing normal chat or abort behavior.

## Evidence

RED: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts` failed before the implementation because `logError` was not called.

GREEN:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  99 passed (99)
```

Focused related proof:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.gateway.config.ts src/gateway/chat-abort.test.ts src/gateway/server-chat.agent-events.test.ts
Test Files  4 passed (4)
Tests  192 passed (192)
```

`git diff --check` passed.



Real logger proof for the exact message shape emitted by the new gateway catch path:

```text
node --import tsx --input-type=module --eval "import { logError } from './src/logger.ts'; logError('gateway: failed to persist terminal session lifecycle event for run proof-run: Error: proof disk full');"
[gateway] failed to persist terminal session lifecycle event for run proof-run: Error: proof disk full
```

This pairs with the focused handler test above: `server-chat.agent-events.test.ts` drives `createAgentEventHandler` through a rejected `persistGatewaySessionLifecycleEvent` and asserts the same `logError(...)` message before the fallback `sessions.changed` broadcast. The logger proof uses a synthetic run id/error and no secrets.

Autoreview note: attempted `python .agents\skills\autoreview\scripts\autoreview --mode local`, but the helper failed before review on Windows path handling with `NotADirectoryError: [WinError 267]` in this non-ASCII worktree path, even when retried through a `subst` drive.
